@@HideFooterComments @@HideFooterLastModified @@protect(true)
##title @@Tags(Official-Help, Help, Wiki, Official, Scope Function)
##toc
${metaColor = #ee2401}
${keywordColor = #318000}
${identifierColor = #c6680e}
==Overview
The Alert scope function renders an alert box with optional style and title.


==Prototype
##Color(${keywordColor}, **#{ Alert }#**)(##Color(${keywordColor}, string) {##Color(${identifierColor}, styleName)}, ##Color(${keywordColor}, string) {##Color(${identifierColor}, titleText)})


===Parameters
{{Bullets
**Name:** ##Color(${identifierColor}, styleName) ##Color(${metaColor}, {Optional})
>**Type:** ##Color(${keywordColor}, string)
>**Default:** ##Color(${identifierColor}, Default)
>**Values:** ##Color(${identifierColor}, "Default, Primary, Secondary, Light, Dark, Success, Info, Warning, Danger, Muted, White")
>**Description:** Optional style of the alert.
**Name:** ##Color(${identifierColor}, titleText) ##Color(${metaColor}, {Optional})
>**Type:** ##Color(${keywordColor}, string)
>**Description:** Optional title text for the alert.
}}

==Examples
{{Code(wiki)
{{Alert(Primary, This is the header text)
This is the body content of the function scope.
}}
}}

{{Alert(default, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **default** alert.
}}
{{Alert(primary, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **primary** alert.
}}
{{Alert(secondary, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **secondary** alert.
}}
{{Alert(success, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **success** alert.
}}
{{Alert(info, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **info** alert.
}}
{{Alert(warning, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **warning** alert.
}}
{{Alert(danger, This is the header text)
This is the body content a **danger** alert.
}}

==See Also
[[Wiki Help :: Function Calling Convention]]
[[Wiki Help :: Scope Function]]
[[Wiki Help :: Instruction Function]]
[[Wiki Help :: Standard Function]]


==Related
##related
